历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3486 → 3763 → 4622 → 5711 → 4544, showing an overall fluctuating and shifting trend. In 2024, it peaked at 5711, then rebounded to 4544 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 1167 in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4544. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 73 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 74 in 2023, 75 in 2024, and 76 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion. The 2026 plan is 74, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight contraction of about 2.6%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 32nd (27th in 2021 → 31st in 2025 → 32nd in 2026), stable around the 30th position, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to campus peeping incidents that have drawn public attention, which may slightly suppress candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 87th (average evaluation), with low exposure on short video platforms. No obvious signs of enrollment gaps have been observed in historical abnormal application records. It has 9 A- or above disciplines: Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-. Its engineering strength is outstanding and highly matches the Physics Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation at South China University of Technology continue to have high social heat (highly recommended in 2024), boosting application willingness. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing is approximately 136,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight decrease from 139,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Provincial control score data is missing. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and has some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwestern region. Its enrollment plan in Chongqing accounts for a small proportion (about 70+ students), placing it in a competitive landscape for high-quality out-of-province students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4544, the slight enrollment contraction in 2026 (-2 students), and the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates, combined with factors such as negative reputation and persistently high major popularity for limited correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 4500, a slight shift of 44 positions from 2025, with a range of 4000–5000.

Candidates with rankings around 4500 should focus on Tier 2 medium majors (Information Engineering, Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering) as main choices, while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near 5000 should use Tier 3 majors as safety options, and may also try Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
